propositions: Create a named ADR documenting the settled op-cert asymmetric-signing model, cross-referencing ADR 0046.
Document uniform producer signing where every environment signs with its own auto-generated Ed25519 key and the trusted server is an ordinary pinned environment.
Cover the environment-attribution model, low/high security postures, and the authoritative-state-fetch integrity requirement.
Document the out-of-band trust root, merge-gate enforcement, and the authoritative era anchor with rotation-with-pin vs kill-switch revocation.
Document HMAC removal via expand-contract migration and the trusted-server runtime with async job API and stateless read-only posture.
ADR is pending the escalated era-anchor design resolution (era-at-HEAD vs independent monotonic anchor) and must contain the strings rebar.opcert.v1, trusted_environments.yaml, and ADR 0046.
